title: Create Aeronautic
description: This is a Minecraft 1.21.1 NeoForge pack centered on the Create mod and Aeronautics for advanced mechanical automation and airships. It is heavily optimized for visuals and performance using Distant Horizons, Sodium, and the EMI utility suite..
body:
🛠️ The Heavy Hitters

These are the mods that will define your actual playtime:

    Create (and its addons): This is your centerpiece. You have the base Create mod along with Aeronautics (physics-based airships), Enchantment Industry, and Power Loader. This setup is geared toward massive, moving mechanical bases.
    Farmers Delight, A game changing food based Mod

    (more comes soon)

🚀 Performance & Graphics

    Sodium & Iris: The best-in-class duo for high frame rates and shader support.

    Lithium & FerriteCore: Optimizes game logic and memory usage to prevent "stutter."

    EntityCulling: Stops the game from rendering mobs you can't see, further boosting FPS.

🔍 Utility & Quality of Life

These make the day-to-day experience much less frustrating:

    EMI (Enchanting, Loot, Ores): Your recipe and item viewer. It’s a cleaner, more modern alternative to JEI.

    Xaero’s WorldMap: Provides a full-screen map to help you navigate your world.

    PacketFixer: A technical necessity for modded play to prevent being kicked from your own world due to large data packets.

    Gravestones: Ensures your items are safe in a chest-like grave when you die.

🎨 Visuals & Details

    Distant Horizons: A literal game-changer. This allows you to see miles into the distance by rendering simplified terrain (LODs) far beyond the standard Minecraft render distance.

    Entity Texture/Model Features: Allows for much more detailed and varied mob appearances.

    BetterDays: Adjusts day/night cycles for a more immersive feel.

    Interiors: Adds decorative blocks to make your Create-powered factories look like actual buildings.
